configurations.name: Launch
initCommands: process handle SIGSEGV --stop true --pass false --notify true
process handle SIGABRT --stop true --pass false --notify true
process handle SIGBUS  --stop true --pass false --notify true
process handle SIGILL  --stop true --pass false --notify true
process handle SIGFPE  --stop true --pass false --notify true
stopCommands: script lldb.thread.SetSelectedFrame([f for f in lldb.thread.frames if f.GetLineEntry().GetFileSpec().GetFilename() != ''][0].GetFrameID())
